introSection: Timber is a wooden roller coaster located at Walibi Rhône-Alpes in Les Avenières, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. It was manufactured by Gravitykraft Corporation, designed by The Gravity Group, LLC and opened on 9 April 2016.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Vertical construction began in October 2015.

At the 2015 IAAPA Expo, the ride's name was announced as Timber. On 9 April 2016, the ride officially opened.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Timber is a smaller Gravitykraft Corporation wooden roller coaster, similar to Roar-O-Saurus at Story Land. The theme and surrounding area were designed by Fabien Manuel.

fullText:
Timber is a wooden roller coaster located at Walibi Rhône-Alpes in Les Avenières, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. It was manufactured by Gravitykraft Corporation, designed by The Gravity Group, LLC and opened on 9 April 2016.

Vertical construction began in October 2015.

At the 2015 IAAPA Expo, the ride's name was announced as Timber. On 9 April 2016, the ride officially opened.

Timber is a smaller Gravitykraft Corporation wooden roller coaster, similar to Roar-O-Saurus at Story Land. The theme and surrounding area were designed by Fabien Manuel.
